title: Tirumalai (Tamil Nadu)
tagline: Tirumalai (Tamil Nadu) — spiritual town of Tamil Nadu

overview.short: Tirumalai (Tamil Nadu) is a much-loved spiritual town in Tamil Nadu, known for temples and pilgrimage.
overview.description: Tirumalai (lit. "the holy mountain"; also later Arhasugiri, lit. "the excellent mountain of the Arha[t]"; Tamil Engunavirai-Tirumalai, lit. "the holy mountain of the Arhar" is a Jain temple and cave complex dating from at least the 9th century CE that is located northwest of Polur in Tamil Nadu, southeast India.

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Arahanthgiri Jain Math
topPlaces.description: Arahanthgiri Jain Math is a Jain Matha established near Tirumalai in August 1998. The Math is headed by Bhattaraka Dhavalakeerthi.

topPlaces.name: Arunachalesvara Temple
topPlaces.description: The Arunachalesvara Temple or Annamalaiyar Temple, is a Hindu temple dedicated to Shiva and Parvati, located at the foothills of the Arunachala hill in Tiruvannamalai, Tamil Nadu, India. It is regarded as one of the significant temples in the Tamil Shaivite tradition.

topPlaces.name: Sri Ramana Ashram
topPlaces.description: Sri Ramana Ashram, also known as Sri Ramanasramam, is a historic ashram (spiritual hermitage and community) and international organisation located at the base of the sacred Arunachala Hill in Tiruvannamalai, Tamil Nadu. It is dedicated to the life and teachings of Ramana Maharshi, modern sage and Advaita (Nondualism) Teacher, who lived here from 1922 until his death in 1950.

topPlaces.name: Vengikkal
topPlaces.description: Vengikkal is the Suburb of Tiruvannamalai city and a census town in the Tiruvannamalai district of Tamil Nadu state of Indian sub-continent. It lies north to the world famous Tiruvannamalai city.

topPlaces.name: Tiruvannamalai Central Bus Station
topPlaces.description: Tiruvannamalai Central Bus Station, commonly known as Tiruvannamalai New Bus Stand, is one of the bus termini of Tiruvannamalai. Sister stations include Manalurpet road station and nine other arterial festive time bus stations, which are primarily used for intra-city buses.

topPlaces.name: Adi Annamalai
topPlaces.description: Adhi Annamalai is a suburb of Thiruvannaamalai and selection grade town Panchayat in Thiruvannamalai Taluk.

topPlaces.name: Arunachala
topPlaces.description: Arunachala (IAST: Aruṇācalam [əɾʊˈɳaːtʃələ], 'Red Mountain') is a hill in Tiruvannamalai district, Tamil Nadu, and one of the five main Shaiva holy places in South India. The Arunachalesvara Temple to Shiva is located at the base of the hill.

topPlaces.name: Athiyandal, Tiruvannamalai
topPlaces.description: Athiyandal is a village in Tiruvannamalai taluk, Tiruvannamalai district, Tamil Nadu State. Athiyandal is 0.6 kilometres (0.37 mi) from its district main city, Tiruvannamalai.

items.note: Arahanthgiri Jain Math is a Jain Matha established near Tirumalai in August 1998. The Math is headed by Bhattaraka Dhavalakeerthi.

The Arunachalesvara Temple or Annamalaiyar Temple, is a Hindu temple dedicated to Shiva and Parvati, located at the foothills of the Arunachala hill in Tiruvannamalai, Tamil Nadu, India. It is regarded as one of the significant temples in the Tamil Shaivite tradition.

Sri Ramana Ashram, also known as Sri Ramanasramam, is a historic ashram (spiritual hermitage and community) and international organisation located at the base of the sacred Arunachala Hill in Tiruvannamalai, Tamil Nadu. It is dedicated to the life and teachings of Ramana Maharshi, modern sage and Advaita (Nondualism) Teacher, who lived here from 1922 until his death in 1950.
Vengikkal is the Suburb of Tiruvannamalai city and a census town in the Tiruvannamalai district of Tamil Nadu state of Indian sub-continent. It lies north to the world famous Tiruvannamalai city.

Tiruvannamalai Central Bus Station, commonly known as Tiruvannamalai New Bus Stand, is one of the bus termini of Tiruvannamalai. Sister stations include Manalurpet road station and nine other arterial festive time bus stations, which are primarily used for intra-city buses.
Adhi Annamalai is a suburb of Thiruvannaamalai and selection grade town Panchayat in Thiruvannamalai Taluk.

Arunachala (IAST: Aruṇācalam [əɾʊˈɳaːtʃələ], 'Red Mountain') is a hill in Tiruvannamalai district, Tamil Nadu, and one of the five main Shaiva holy places in South India. The Arunachalesvara Temple to Shiva is located at the base of the hill.
Athiyandal is a village in Tiruvannamalai taluk, Tiruvannamalai district, Tamil Nadu State. Athiyandal is 0.6 kilometres (0.37 mi) from its district main city, Tiruvannamalai.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Tirumalai (Tamil Nadu)?
faq.a: The best time to visit Tirumalai (Tamil Nadu) is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Tirumalai (Tamil Nadu)?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Chennai International Airport (147 km) and the nearest railway station is Tirupati Railway Station (162 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Tirumalai (Tamil Nadu)?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Tirumalai (Tamil Nadu) at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Tirumalai (Tamil Nadu)?
faq.a: Stays in Tirumalai (Tamil Nadu) start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Tirumalai (Tamil Nadu)?
faq.a: The top attractions are Arahanthgiri Jain Math, Arunachalesvara Temple, Sri Ramana Ashram, Vengikkal, Tiruvannamalai Central Bus Station.
